title: Objectively
description: Additions to the vanilla scoreboard objective system
body:
This mod adds some additional features to the Minecraft Scoreboard system. Some of the features include:
- Limiting scoreboard queries with the gamerule `scoreboardQueryFrequency`. Set this value to the number of ticks between queries. This helps reduce lag when adding many types of queries.
- Allowing automatic adding of players to objectives using `/objectively <objective> true`
- Adding custom critera types:
  - Max Health Attribute (max_health)
